sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107675" key="u(pe/rmazos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπέρμαζος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n107675.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">above the breasts,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.44</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
